part.specialInstructions: Not for any YZ125/X or YZ450F
part.bullet1: The latest in sintered metal brake pad fusion technology
part.bullet2: Has the highest friction rating possible - 0.6 - for strong, fade-free stopping power
part.bullet3: Pad blend includes molybdenum metal and tungsten additives to enhance friction performance for the life of the pad
part.bullet4: No lead, iron, or steel additives; no more rotor outline etching or rotor stiction
part.bullet5: Super-fast bed-in, full friction after 10 to 15 race stop uses
part.bullet6: Great heat cycle ability; pads cool after the race and perform just as strong the next race day

part.bullet1: Provide even higher levels of grip compared to the GPFA pads
part.bullet2: Improved heat cycling - pads can be raced, allowed to cool and be re-used without a loss in brake performance
part.bullet3: New material wear better, causes less rotor/disc wear than previous materials - pads should be good for four or five races of 20 to 25 laps (depending on track lap length)
part.bullet4: Fade-free stopping power with fingertip control
part.bullet5: For use on race bikes with slick tires and high-performance brake calipers.
part.bullet6: GPFAX Race pads are for race/track use only; not for street use. Any other use could result in death or serious injury.

part.specialInstructions: YR APP FOR FXR S/B L87-9425PJL
part.bullet1: The latest in sintered metal brake pad fusion technology
part.bullet2: Has the highest friction rating possible - 0.6 - for strong, fade-free stopping power
part.bullet3: Pad blend includes molybdenum metal and tungsten additives to enhance friction performance for the life of the pad
part.bullet4: No lead, iron, or steel additives; no more rotor outline etching or rotor stiction
part.bullet5: Super-fast bed-in, full friction after 10 to 15 race stop uses
part.bullet6: Great heat cycle ability; pads cool after the race and perform just as strong the next race day

part.bullet5: For use on race bikes with slick tires and high-performance brake calipers.

part.productName: MD Series Pro-Lite Contour Brake Rotor
part.bullet1: Floating brake disc with a radical, profiled contour brake rotor ring
part.bullet2: Brake disc design reduces weight and increases brake effect
part.bullet3: Brake disc center hubs are forged aluminum
part.bullet4: Rotor construction uses high-friction billet steel
part.bullet5: Universal left-side or right-side application
part.bullet6: Select front rotors available with SD-System™ of square-sided buttons that allow the rotor to expand inwards and outwards unrestrained for perfect rotor functionality at any speed or load and increased durability

part.bullet5: 10-15% uprated heavy duty clutch springs

part.bullet5: EBC brake pads contain Aramid fibers, these are man-made high performance fibers, used widely for their light weight, high strength, abrasion resistance and thermal stability. They are used as reinforcements in ballistic protection (bullet---proof helmets and vests, vehicle armor), cut-resistant gloves, aircraft and marine structural parts, power transmission belts and of course friction products where their high strength to weight, thermal stability and abrasion resistance provide advantages over cheaper steel fiber based products.

part.bullet1: High specification silicone-based brake fluid, used mostly in H-D brake systems
part.bullet2: Doesn't absorb water from the surrounding atmosphere while in service and offers greatly extended service life while improving corrosion resistance
part.bullet3: Recommended for use in the hydraulic brake and clutch systems of all cars, commercial vehicles, and motorcycles for which non-petroleum based fluid is specified
part.bullet4: Available in 250 mL bottles

part.bullet1: Organic brake pads feature aramid fibers; these are man made high-performance fibers used widely for their light weight, high strength, abrasion resistance and thermal stability
part.bullet2: Aramid fibers have high strength to-weight, thermal stability and abrasion resistance to provide advantages over cheaper steel fiber-based products

part.bullet1: Organic brake pads feature aramid fibers; these are man made high-performance fibers used widely for their light weight, high strength, abrasion resistance and thermal stability
part.bullet2: Aramid fibers have high strength to-weight, thermal stability and abrasion resistance to provide advantages over cheaper steel fiber-based products

part.bullet1: The worlds number one selling organic disc brake pads
part.bullet2: Strong, predictable brake response and fingertip control
part.bullet3: Give you excellent stopping excellent stopping power without noise and rotor galling, even on polished rotors
part.bullet4: Sold as a set for one disc
part.bullet5: EBC brake pads contain Aramid fibers, these are man-made high performance fibers, used widely for their light weight, high strength, abrasion resistance and thermal stability. They are used as reinforcements in ballistic protection (bullet---proof helmets and vests, vehicle armor), cut-resistant gloves, aircraft and marine structural parts, power transmission belts and of course friction products where their high strength to weight, thermal stability and abrasion resistance provide advantages over cheaper steel fiber based products.

part.bullet5: 10-15% uprated heavy duty clutch springs

part.bullet1: Brass carburetor jets are high-precision and flow-calibrated for extremely accurate fuel flow rate
part.bullet2: For Kawasaki, Suzuki and Yamaha OEM BS CV carburetors
part.bullet3: High-quality replacements; NOT original Mikuni jets

part.bullet2: One set of bolts includes one per bolt hole in your rotor
